name: expert-ai
description: Expert AI - Intelligent Research Agent with PI Framework
readme:
# Expert AI

**A professional research terminal for knowledge workers.** Expert AI brings
evidence-based, citation-grade AI research to your command line — purpose-built for the
**AEC** disciplines (Architecture, Engineering & Construction) and extensible across the
sciences, planning, policy, and interdisciplinary work.

Sign in once with your **ssv.asia** membership and start researching. No API keys to
manage, no provider setup — models, limits, and the curated knowledge ecosystem are
handled for you, server-side.

> **Membership required.** Expert AI is for ssv.asia members. Not a member yet? Join free
> at **[https://ssv.asia/](https://ssv.asia/)** — the Community tier is free forever.

---

## Why Expert AI

Most AI tools are general-purpose chatbots. Expert AI is tuned for **depth researchers and
practitioners** who need rigor, not vibes:

- **Evidence-based methodology** — answers oriented around sources, citations, and
  defensible reasoning rather than confident guesses.
- **Domain depth in AEC** — informed by a curated body of architecture, engineering, and
  construction research, with first-class support for precedent analysis, building systems,
  structural detailing, environmental design, and design theory.
- **Multidisciplinary reach** — science, urban planning, environmental policy, social
  science, and cross-disciplinary synthesis.
- **Terminal-native** — fast, scriptable, and at home in a professional's workflow. No tab
  switching, no browser.

## Who it's for

Architects, engineers, urban planners, academic researchers, policy analysts, and
independent scholars — anyone who does **serious knowledge work** and wants an AI research
assistant that respects sources and methodology.

## Research domains

| Domain | Coverage |
|--------|----------|
| **Architecture & Design** | Precedent analysis, design theory, historical context, spatial reasoning |
| **Engineering & Building** | Structural design, building systems, materials, construction detailing |
| **Planning & Environment** | Urban systems, site analysis, sustainability, environmental design |
| **Science & Research** | Methodology, literature synthesis, data interpretation |
| **Social Science & Policy** | Evidence-based policy, organizational and cultural analysis |
| **Interdisciplinary** | Cross-domain synthesis, innovation systems, theory |

## The ssv.asia research ecosystem

Your membership connects the terminal to the wider ssv.asia platform:

- **ai.ssv.asia** — doctoral-grade research models
- **Universal Search** — curated AEC and multidisciplinary knowledge retrieval
- **mathbook** — applied calculations and formula design
- **map.ssv.asia** — geospatial and contextual exploration
- A dedicated **research think tank** community

---

## Install

Requires **Node.js ≥ 20.19**. Works on **macOS, Windows, and Linux**.

```bash
npm install -g expert-ai
```

That single command installs everything — the Expert AI research engine and all its
dependencies. Nothing else to configure.

## Quick start

```bash
x
```

On first run, enter your ssv.asia email and confirm in the browser (a one-time sign-in on
ssv.asia). Your session is remembered, so you'll typically sign in about once a day.

```
Expert AI
Community  10/10 free messages left
Press u to buy a 6-hour pass (UPI — scan & go).

1  Research
2  Eureka
3  Config
u  Buy a pass
l  Log out
q  Quit
```

With an active pass the header shows your live session instead:

```
Expert AI
Researcher  ⏳ 5h 12m left
tokens — free 0/1,000,000 · pro 0/1,000,000
```

Inside a research session:

```
research> What are contemporary strategies for adaptive reuse of heritage masonry buildings?
[evidence-based analysis with citations...]

research> /model ssv.asia/pro      switch to the advanced reasoning model
research> /menu                    back to the main menu
```

## Membership tiers & passes

Community is free forever; paid tiers are **6-hour session passes** (buy as you need them).

| Tier | What you get | Best for |
|------|--------------|----------|
| **Community** *(free)* | 10 messages, one-time trial | Evaluating the platform |
| **Researcher Pass** | 6-hr session · large free + pro token budget | Active research & long documents |
| **Engineer Pass** | 6-hr session · bigger budgets + agentic/tool use | Heavy, agentic workflows |
| **Professional Pass** | 6-hr session · top budgets | Power users, deep sessions |

The terminal shows your **time left** and **tokens remaining** live in the menu. Buy or
renew a pass any time — right from the terminal.

### Pricing

| Pass | Price | USD* | Session | Tokens (free + pro) | Capabilities |
|------|-------|------|---------|---------------------|--------------|
| **Community** | Free | Free | one-time | 10 messages | Chat with free models |
| **Researcher** | **₹60** | ~$0.63 | 6 hours | 1,000,000 + 1,000,000 | Free + Pro models · web + local document research |
| **Engineer** | **₹120** | ~$1.27 | 6 hours | 2,000,000 + 2,000,000 | Everything in Researcher · agentic tool use |
| **Professional** | **₹180** | ~$1.90 | 6 hours | 3,000,000 + 3,000,000 | Top budgets · deep sessions · priority routing |

<sub>*USD shown at ≈ ₹94.74/$ (Jun 2026); billed in INR, so the exact USD amount varies with the exchange rate.</sub>

Each pass is a fresh 6-hour window with a full token budget. Tokens count **down** from
full as you use them, so you always see exactly what's left.

### Paying with UPI — scan & go

No web checkout, no card forms. Buy a pass **inside the terminal**:

```bash
x            # open the menu
# press  u   → choose a pass
```

A **UPI QR code renders right in your terminal**. Scan it with your phone camera (or any
UPI app — GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), pay, and your pass activates **automatically** the moment
payment clears — the terminal drops you straight back to the menu with your live session.

```
Researcher — ₹60

   █▀▀▀▀▀█ ▄▀ █ █▀▀▀▀▀█
   █ ███ █ ▀▄▀  █ ███ █     ← scan with your phone
   █▄▄▄▄▄█ ▀ ▀▀ █▄▄▄▄▄█

Scan with your phone camera (or any UPI app)
Waiting for payment.... ✔ Payment received — pass active for 6 hours!
```

Payments are processed securely by **Razorpay**. Your pass is tied to your signed-in
ssv.asia account, so it always lands on the right profile.

## Commands

```bash
x            # sign in / open the menu
x qt         # Quick Thoughts — jot straight into your Obsidian daily note (alias: x ssv)
x qt config  # set your vault path, daily-notes folder, and date format
x logout     # sign out on this device
```

**Quick Thoughts** is a free, offline companion: a fast capture mode that timestamps each
line and writes it into today's Obsidian daily note. No account or quota needed.

## How it works

Expert AI runs entirely through a secured gateway:

- **No provider keys on your machine.** All model calls route through the Expert AI
  gateway, which holds credentials server-side. The CLI only ever stores a short-lived,
  signed session token.
- **Members-only.** Access is gated by your ssv.asia membership; usage limits are enforced
  server-side and cannot be bypassed locally.
- **Privacy-respecting.** No telemetry.

## Security & privacy

- Credentials never ship in the package and never touch your disk.
- Session tokens are signed, short-lived, and bound to your account and tier.
- Usage metering and rate limits are enforced atomically on the server.

## Support

- **Membership & account:** [https://ssv.asia/](https://ssv.asia/)
- **Upgrades:** [https://ssv.asia/](https://ssv.asia/)

## License

MIT. Built on the [pi](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent) agent
framework.
